comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text:
🌍 How would you rate Morocco as a travel destination after watching this documentary? Give it a score from 0–10 in the comments!
🧭 We'd also love to know where you're watching from. Share your country or city and join our growing community of travel lovers from around the world.
❤ If you enjoyed this journey through Morocco's history, culture, and breathtaking landscapes, please like, subscribe, and share this documentary with your friends and family.
Every subscription and every comment inspires us to keep exploring remarkable places and bringing more cinematic travel documentaries to the channel. Thank you for being part of our adventure!

replies.author: @Arabic-501
replies.text:
I'm watching from Rawalpindi Pakistan!!
Maa Shaa Allah your video is amazing, I'm curious to know how you made this video?
Probably you did a lot of research before it!!
Subscribed your channel because I love to see this type of content!!!❤

comments.author: @Arabic-501
comments.text: Watching after Morocco football team reached to round 8 in FIFA world cup 2026 after beating Canada in round 16 by 3-0!!😊❤

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: History in the making! 🇲🇦⚽️ So glad that win led you to discover the beauty of Morocco here. Please stay tuned and keep supporting the channel for more! ✨🙏❤️

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Thanks for asking! 🙏 I’m glad you liked the footage. Could you please tell me how and where you plan to use it? I usually allow small clips for non-commercial/educational purposes as long as you provide full credit to the channel. I don't allow re-uploading the full video, though. Let me know! ✨🎬

comments.author: @ltogigokfjsbd22
comments.text: we are amazigh marrocans  not arab  we don't look like african we are just marrocans we see our self just  marrocans amazigh When we hear someone describe us as Africans or Arabs, we feel confused because we live focused on ourselves as Moroccans

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Respect to the Amazigh Moroccans! 🇲🇦 Thank you for sharing your history and identity with us. ✨🙏❤️
